ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-30-2019 CONTINUED TO OCT-01-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-01-2019 CONTINUED TO NOV-19-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-14-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF EVA NUNEZ MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-18-663120 WITH CASE CGC-19-572968 IS DENIED. JUDGMENT HAS BEEN ENTERED IN ACTION CUD-18-663120 ON DECEMBER 20, 2018. IT ALSO APPEARS FROM THE REGISTERED OF ACTIONS THAT THE JUDGMENT MIGHT HAVE BEEN SATISFIED. MOVING PARTY PRESENTS NO EVIDENCE THAT THE ACTION IS "PENDING" WITHIN THE MEANING OF CCP 1048(A). FURTHER, NOTICE OF MOTION FAILS FOR COMPLY WITH CRC 3.350. FINALLY, WHILE PLAINTIFF CLAIMS THAT SHE FILED AN ANSWER IN THE UD ACTION (POINTS AND AUTHORITIES 10:21), NO SUCH FILED ANSWER IS ATTACHED OF COULD BE LOCATED IN THE FILE. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-19-2019 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2019 Continued To Nov-19-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Nov-19-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Court orders notice of Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Continued To Oct-01-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-01-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: ANDREW Y.S. CHENG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-18-663120 WITH CASE CGC-19-572968
Off Calendar Feb-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF EVA NUNEZ MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-18-663120 WITH CASE CGC-19-572968 is DENIED. Judgment has been entered in action CUD-18-663120 on December 20, 2018. It also appears from the Registered of Actions that the judgment might have been satisfied. Moving party presents no evidence that the action is "pending" within the meaning of CCP 1048(a). Further, Notice of Motion fails for comply with CRC 3.350. Finally, while Plaintiff claims that she filed an answer in the UD action (Points and Authorities 10:21), no such filed answer is attached of could be located in the file. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
